metadata.description: Create foundational monorepo directory structure, Rust workspace, TypeScript workspace
Create foundational JSON Schema files for Nexus wire contracts, validation tooling, and CI integration
Implement schema-to-code generation pipeline (JSON Schema → TypeScript + Rust)

plans.title: Domain Models Implementation
plans.notes: Merged to main. 15 aggregates, 133 tests, QC三审 passed.

metadata.description: Implement domain models (15 aggregates) with consistency rules and gates
metadata.qc_status: APPROVE — C-1 and C-2 fixed and verified

plans.title: CLI + Daemon Foundation
plans.notes: Merged to main. QC三审 passed (2 blocking issues fixed). 156/156 tests passing. 61 files changed. 4 commits merged.

metadata.description: Implement nexus42 CLI and nexus42d daemon with dual-subject auth, Creator/Manuscript/Research command surfaces, HTTP Local API, and SQLite workspace state

plans.title: Sync Contract Implementation
plans.notes: Merged to main. QC三审 APPROVE (10 blocking issues fixed). QA PASS (226/226 tests). 22 files changed, 4479 insertions. 2 commits + merge.

metadata.description: Implement sync mechanism (Command, DeltaBundle, Outbox) with bundle metadata fields, partial apply semantics, local precheck, and conflict resolution
metadata.task_modified_2: Task 3: Add bundle metadata fields (submitting_creator_id, manuscript_phase, output_manuscript)
metadata.tests: 70 nexus-sync tests, 226 workspace total — all passing
qc_fixed: SYNC-C2: Fragile conflict detection replaced with JSON parsing
SYNC-C3: Outbox write methods wrapped in transactions (append, stage, mark_failed)
SYNC-C4: cli-sync bundle schema delta required fields added
SYNC-C5: ConflictDetail parsing uses safe conversion
SYNC-H1: Unsafe unwrap replaced with expect()
SYNC-H2: ConflictResponse::from_json returns error on missing success field
SYNC-H3: Duplicate create detection only checks creates WITH target_id
SYNC-H4: mark_sent no longer allows failed→sent transition
SYNC-H5: Exponential backoff uses saturating arithmetic

plans.title: ACP Client Integration
plans.notes: Ready for implementation. Plan approved with residuals (ACP-R1, ACP-R2 deferred to implementation start).

metadata.description: Integrate ACP Rust SDK, Registry, and Local API minimum contract
metadata.review_verdict: Approve with Residuals (ACP-R1, R2 deferred to implementation-start)

plans.title: Context Assembly Basic
plans.notes: Blocked until cli-daemon-foundation, sync-contract, and acp-client complete. Plan file must be rewritten from restructured spec after dependencies resolve.

metadata.description: Implement Context Assembly basic version — CLI-side only (summary generation + Local API call + bundle metadata). Platform-side service belongs in private nexus-platform repo.
metadata.blocked_reason: Depends on: (1) cli-daemon for nexus42 context assemble command, (2) sync-contract for bundle metadata fields + story_manifest delta, (3) acp-client for Local API proxy
metadata.next_action: Rewrite plan file from .agents/plans/knowledge/restructured-context-assembly-v1.md after Phase 1a+1b+2 complete

notes.message: Phase 0 plans execute on main branch for initialization. Phase 1+ plans require feature branches.
Phase 0 complete: monorepo-structure, json-schema-foundation, codegen-pipeline all done. 15 commits on main. Ready for Phase 1.
Phase 1 Wave 0-1.5 complete: Architecture review, domain-models implementation (15 aggregates, 133 tests), QC三审, Critical fixes (C-1, C-2) verified.
domain-models merged to main. Residual findings recorded for cli-daemon-foundation, sync-contract, acp-client, context-assembly, and domain-models (non-blocking QC items).

Phase 1 Wave 2 architecture review complete. cli-daemon-foundation and sync-contract plans expanded. CLI-R1..R4, SYNC-R1..R3 upgraded from 'defer' to 'resolve'. Implementation order: cli-daemon → sync-contract → acp-client → context-assembly.

Clarify phase complete. 4 future iteration points recorded as residual findings (CLI-R5..R8): Unix socket support, manuscript promote strict mode, manuscript verify content checks, research scan content extraction. Ready for implementation.
cli-daemon-foundation merged to main. 61 files changed, 156/156 tests passing, QC三审 APPROVE. Residual findings CLI-R9..R15 tracked for V1.1. Ready for next plan: sync-contract.

sync-contract merged to main. 22 files changed, 4479 insertions, 70 nexus-sync tests (226 workspace total). QC三审 APPROVE (10 blocking fixed), QA PASS. Residual findings SYNC-R4..R13 tracked for V1.1. Next: acp-client.

2025-04-05-domain-models.title: SourceAnchor.unit_kind not marked required in schema
2025-04-05-domain-models.target: Before V1.0 GA — add "required": ["unit_kind"] when platform confirms all sources provide unit_kind

2025-04-05-domain-models.title: Integration test coverage for World and WorldMembership contract roundtrip
2025-04-05-domain-models.target: Before Wave 2 — add domain↔contract roundtrip tests for World and WorldMembership

2025-04-05-domain-models.title: Edge-case test coverage for Pairing and ForkBranch lifecycle
2025-04-05-domain-models.target: Before V1.0 GA — add boundary/edge-case tests for concurrent pairing conflicts, fork cycle detection

2025-04-05-domain-models.title: Error message ergonomics and domain error variant coverage
2025-04-05-domain-models.target: Before V1.0 GA — review error messages for user-facing clarity, add Display impl tests

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Missing Creator command surface
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 creator subcommand — register, status, use, list, pair, unpair, logout, credentials rotate
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: Added Task 6: Creator Command Module to plan

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Missing Manuscript command surface
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 manuscript subcommand — status, phase, output, promote, verify
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: Added Task 7: Manuscript Command Module to plan

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Missing Research command surface
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 research subcommand — scan, list, extract
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: Added Task 8: Research Command Module (V1.0 minimal) to plan

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Auth model covers only single-user tokens, missing dual-subject auth
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: Auth module — needs User tokens + Creator API keys as separate subjects
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: Task 3 redesigned: split into user_auth.rs and creator_auth.rs for dual-subject auth

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Local API Unix socket support for better IPC performance
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42d Local API — currently HTTP over TCP loopback (port 8420); Unix socket provides better security and performance for local IPC
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1+ — add Unix socket support as optional transport; keep HTTP as default for V1.0

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Manuscript promote precondition checks (strict mode)
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 manuscript promote — V1.0 uses loose constraints (user-initiated, no hard pre-checks); strict mode could enforce phase transitions (review→finalize), StoryManifest status, sync state
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1+ — add optional strict mode with `--strict` flag or workspace config

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Manuscript verify content integrity checks
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 manuscript verify — V1.0 verifies metadata only; content integrity (comparing content_hash with actual file SHA256) deferred
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1+ — add `--check-content` flag to verify manuscript file integrity against StoryManifest.content_hash

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Research scan content extraction for PDF and URL sources
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: nexus42 research scan — V1.0 records metadata only (path, size, hash, title); PDF text extraction and URL content fetching deferred
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1+ — add `--extract-text` flag to enable content extraction for PDF and URL sources; may require external tools (pdftotext, http client)

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: SQLite connection per request (performance impact)
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: crates/nexus42d/src/workspace/mod.rs:62-72 — WorkspaceState::db() opens new SQLite connection per request instead of using connection pool
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1 — add r2d2 or deadpool-sqlite connection pooling for production load handling

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: SQLite schema duplication across CLI and daemon
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: crates/nexus42/src/commands/creator.rs:273, research.rs:132, crates/nexus42d/src/workspace/mod.rs:122 — creators and reference_sources tables defined in 3 places
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1 — extract schema definitions to shared module or centralize SQLite operations through daemon API

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Inconsistent error propagation across command handlers
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: Multiple command handlers use `.unwrap_or_default()` on HTTP responses, silently swallowing errors
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1 — standardize error propagation with logging before fallback, extract helper methods in errors.rs

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Missing workspace validation before operations
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: Command handlers (init, creator, manuscript) don't validate workspace state before performing operations
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1 — add workspace state validation checks to prevent operations on uninitialized or corrupted workspaces

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Unsafe unwrap in error paths
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: Multiple instances of `.unwrap()` in production code paths that could panic on unexpected errors
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1 — replace unwrap with proper error handling using Result types and error_chain/thiserror

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: Concurrent workspace access race condition
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: Mutex<Option<Connection>> pattern in workspace state may cause race conditions under concurrent access
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1 — use async-aware RwLock or switch to connection pool pattern to handle concurrent access safely

2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.title: No tracing in daemon API handlers
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.scope: crates/nexus42d/src/api/handlers/*.rs — HTTP handlers lack tracing/logging statements for request tracking and debugging
2025-04-05-cli-daemon-foundation.target: V1.1 — add tracing::info/debug statements to handlers for request lifecycle observability

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Missing bundle metadata fields
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: Added to Task 3: Bundle metadata fields (submitting_creator_id, manuscript_phase, output_manuscript, story_manifest delta)

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Missing partial apply semantics
2025-04-05-sync-contract.scope: DeltaBundle apply pipeline — platform must support partial success (some deltas applied, some rejected)
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: Added Task 6: Partial Apply Semantics to plan

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Missing local precheck (Stage 0)
2025-04-05-sync-contract.scope: Sync client — CLI should validate bundle locally before pushing to platform
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: Added Task 7: Local Precheck Stage to plan

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Missing outbox transaction atomicity tests
2025-04-05-sync-contract.scope: crates/nexus-sync/src/outbox.rs — no tests for concurrent writes, rollback, crash recovery
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — add concurrent append tests, transaction rollback tests

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: No HTTP request body size limit on SyncClient
2025-04-05-sync-contract.scope: crates/nexus-sync/src/sync_client.rs — Client::builder() has no max body size
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — add body_max_size to client builder

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: No auth match validation in precheck
2025-04-05-sync-contract.scope: crates/nexus-sync/src/precheck.rs — submitting_creator_id not validated against authenticated identity
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: Requires daemon context — add when daemon exposes authenticated creator info

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: BundleBuilder missing monotonicity validation
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — precheck already handles; add optional validate() to builder

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Schema allOf may not enforce constraints correctly
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — verify codegen output; inline constraints if needed

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Outbox schema migration path not documented
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — add schema_version column and migration strategy

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: No retry logic based on retry_after field
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — honor retry_after from conflict response

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: Partial apply doesn't persist retry state
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — persist partial apply state to outbox for retry

2025-04-05-sync-contract.title: AutoReject resolution safety mechanism
2025-04-05-sync-contract.target: V1.1 — add confirmation prompt for auto-reject in CLI

2025-04-05-acp-client.title: Missing frozen capability ID contract reference
2025-04-05-acp-client.scope: ACP skill/capability registration — must reference frozen capability ID list from ACP Registry
2025-04-05-acp-client.target: Wire frozen capability IDs during implementation start (implementation-start gate)

2025-04-05-acp-client.title: Missing nexus42 acp probe command
2025-04-05-acp-client.scope: CLI command — probe ACP Registry or local agent to verify connectivity and capability set
2025-04-05-acp-client.target: Add probe command during implementation start (implementation-start gate)

2025-04-05-context-assembly.title: Original plan file still contains incorrect scope (Neo4j/pgvector in Rust)
2025-04-05-context-assembly.target: Rewrite plan file from .agents/plans/knowledge/restructured-context-assembly-v1.md after cli-daemon, sync-contract, acp-client complete
